ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_file" TEXT /* File path to the configuration file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the simulation belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the simulation */,
  "sim_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the simulation */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input set */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the input set belongs to */,
  "ex" REAL /* End-effector coordinate x */,
  "ey" REAL /* End-effector coordinate y */,
  "ez" REAL /* End-effector coordinate z */,
  "etheta1" REAL /* Joint angle parameter 1 */,
  "etheta2" REAL /* Joint angle parameter 2 */,
  "etheta3" REAL /* Joint angle parameter 3 */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance value */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input */,
  "input_source" TEXT /* Source of the input data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output result */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input set the output result belongs to */,
  "iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations required for calculation */,
  "computational_time" REAL /* Computational time required for calculation */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output */,
  "output_source" TEXT /* Source of the output data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES inputs ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the access control belongs to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the access control belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access control applies to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, editor) */,
  "access_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the access control */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or conditions for the access control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm */,
  "algorithm_status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm version was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the algorithm version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the simulation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* Source of the result data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("algorithm_id")
)
